'''GoldFruit''', or '''goldfruit''', was a sweet [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] with a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] rind. It could be used to enhance flavors in a dessert.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1stm}}
